evidence: Runtime demo, independently re-run by the orchestrator: npx tsx --test scripts/scan-comment-citations.test.ts on the merged main branch -- 12/12 cells pass across 4 suites (classifyComment, scanFile synthetic fixtures, scanRepo synthetic fixtures directory-walk+aggregation, scanRepo full monorepo run). The scanRepo synthetic-fixtures block replaces the prior real-file-dependent live-repo integration cells with 3 cells built on a temp-directory helper (makeTempRepo/removeTempRepo) mirroring the existing scanFile fixture style: full-entry-point citation finding, repeated-id aggregation across files, and node_modules/dist/*.test.ts exclusion coverage (a check the removed real-repo cells never isolated). No dependency remains on any specific real citation's continued existence in any package -- the conflict class that broke TASK-107's original pin during TASK-108 cannot recur for TASK-110 through TASK-115.

criteria_results.criterion: The 'scanRepo -- live-repo integration' describe block's cells assert against synthetic fixture strings, not real file paths or real citations.
criteria_results.evidence: Block renamed to 'scanRepo -- synthetic fixtures (directory-walk + aggregation)'; all 3 cells use makeTempRepo-constructed temp directories, zero references to real package file paths.
12/12 pass, independently re-run by the orchestrator on merged main.
